mysql.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.

sql.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.

database.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never build queries with string formatting.

query.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries with placeholders, never f-strings or .format().

login.warning: Avoid CWE-521 (Weak Password Requirements): Enforce minimum length >8 and use bcrypt for hashing. Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Never hardcode passwords or secrets.

password.warning: Avoid CWE-521: Use bcrypt or argon2 for password hashing, never MD5/SHA1. Avoid CWE-798: Never store credentials in source code.

auth.warning: Avoid CWE-521: Enforce strong password policies. Avoid CWE-798: Load secrets from environment variables, never hardcode them.

upload.warning: Avoid CWE-434 (Unrestricted Upload): Validate file type, size, and content. Store uploads outside the webroot. Never trust client-provided filenames.

file.warning: Avoid CWE-22 (Path Traversal): Sanitise file paths, reject '../' sequences, use os.path.basename(). Avoid CWE-434: Validate uploads strictly.

path.warning: Avoid CWE-22 (Path Traversal): Never use user input directly in file paths. Use os.path.join() with basename sanitisation.

subprocess.warning: Avoid CWE-78 (OS Command Injection): Never pass user input to subprocess with shell=True. Use argument lists instead.

os.system.warning: Avoid CWE-78 (OS Command Injection): Never use os.system() with user input. Use subprocess with shell=False and argument lists.

eval.warning: Avoid CWE-78: Never use eval() or exec() on user-supplied input. Use safer alternatives like ast.literal_eval().

pickle.warning: Avoid CWE-502 (Deserialization of Untrusted Data): Never unpickle data from untrusted sources. Use JSON or a safe serialisation format.

yaml.warning: Avoid CWE-502: Always use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load(). Unsafe YAML loading allows arbitrary code execution.

xml.warning: Avoid CWE-611 (XML External Entity): Disable external entity processing. Use defusedxml instead of xml.etree.

render.warning: Avoid CWE-79 (Cross-Site Scripting): Never insert user input into HTML without escaping. Use render_template() not render_template_string() with raw input.

html.warning: Avoid CWE-79 (XSS): Always escape user input before rendering in HTML. Use template engines with auto-escaping enabled.

cookie.warning: Avoid CWE-614: Set Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite flags on all cookies. Never store sensitive data in cookies without encryption.

secret.warning: Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Load secrets from environment variables or a secrets manager. Never commit them to source code.
